title: Senior Client Manager
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Dentsu is an integrated growth and transformation partner to the world’s leading organizations. Founded in 1901 in Tokyo, Japan, and now present in over 145 countries and regions, it has a proven track record of nurturing and developing innovations, combining the talents of its global network of leadership brands to deliver impactful and integrated growth solutions for clients. At MKTG, we believe that sport and entertainment have the power to positively impact human behaviour. Taking a purpose-led approach, we help clients harness the power of sports, entertainment, culture, and community to impact human behaviour through meaningful marketing solutions and experiences. The experiences we create engage customers, build memorable brands, and deliver value. We work with major sports and events rights holders, brand sponsors, teams, leagues, venues, and talent to create unique sponsorship marketing platforms, content, experiences, and brand activations that engage fans and drive business and brand outcomes. We are part of Dentsu Sports International, a global sports network comprising MKTG Sports & Entertainment, dentsu Sports Analytics, and dentsu Sports.

Job Summary

As Senior Client Manager of sponsorships and partnerships, you will lead and manage APAC client relationships, activation plans, projects, and client servicing teams across major regional and global sports sponsorships and partnerships. You will deliver and implement innovative collaborations within the sports and entertainment industry, ensuring seamless execution and driving measurable business outcomes.

Responsibilities

  • Lead ownership and accountability for client and account fees and activation budgets, ensuring accurate financial tracking and transparent reporting of client commercials
  • Act as the primary communication bridge between the regional client sponsorship team, the client’s regional marketing team, and key sports partners to align objectives and execution
  • Manage relationships with client partners holding pass-through rights at a regional level, addressing partner concerns, enforcing promotional guidelines, and maximizing partner rights utilization
  • Direct and oversee the client team to deliver retained and project work including event planning, on-ground activations, branding, merchandise, social content, PR, ambassador programmes, and asset management with excellence
  • Support Directors by managing project resources and workloads, ensuring timely completion of deliverables and accurate timesheet submissions
  • Drive new business growth by contributing to proposals, pitches, and identifying expansion opportunities with existing and new clients
  • Represent the agency in industry forums and contribute to thought leadership through written content, presentations, and webinars
  • Provide strategic counsel to clients and partners, developing campaigns, activations, and integrated marketing solutions that deliver best-in-class service and measurable impact

Required competencies and certifications

  • Experience working within the sports and entertainment industry, specifically Formula 1, is essential
  • 5–7 years of marketing experience agency-side, client-side, or with a rights holder, focused on sports sponsorships and activation programs
  • Strong technical knowledge of sponsorship and partnership marketing, with demonstrated attention to detail and commitment to execution excellence
  • Proven strategic thinking skills to develop campaigns and integrated marketing solutions aligned with client objectives
  • Ability to manage projects effectively within dynamic, collaborative team environments
  • Strong commercial acumen to evaluate sponsorship performance and drive measurable business impact

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Enjoys managing projects and thrives in a dynamic, collaborative team environment

Other Information

This is a permanent role based in Singapore. The team operates under flexible working arrangements, with presence in the client office and Dentsu Sports International office.

Inclusion and Diversity At Dentsu, we embrace diversity and inclusion, valuing the unique perspectives and contributions of every individual. We believe diversity fuels creativity and innovation, benefiting our employees, partners, and communities. We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of race, ethnicity, nationality, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, marital status, or any other protected characteristic. Beyond recruitment, we strive to create an environment where everyone feels respected, supported, and empowered to bring their authentic selves to work.

---
